rulings.Case Title: **TRANSFERRED TO CONTRA COSTA** THE ANNA MARIA MERCADO 2009 IRREVOCABLE SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #6, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: Property on Hand at the beginning of this accounting period does not jibe with the property on hand at the end of the prior accounting period. [Probate Code Section 1061(a)(1).] Carmen Mercado's request for reimbursement of $53.87 is not supported by any explanation or receipt. Attorney fees from the prior accounting have reportedly not been paid, but the accounting does not include a liabilities schedule (despite the allegation in paragraph 12). The request to waive or decrease the amount of bond is missing from the caption of the petition. [CRC 7.102.] The calculation of the amount of bond in paragraph 13 of the petition also appears to be incorrect. The detailed schedules supporting the summary of account must show the nature or purpose of each receipt or disbursement, the source of the receipt or name of the payee, and the date thereof. [Prob. C. Section 1062.] The date of any order authorizing payment of fiduciary or attorney fees must also be set forth in the description of any such disbursement. [CRC 7.575(e)(6)(C).] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/30/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B. (In interim accountings, only the ENDING balance needs to be verified by original or verified electronic account statements. [Probate Code Section 2620(c)(2) and LRSF 14.35 D.] The account statement should encompass the ending date, not precede it.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENT CHI KIN SUN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/19/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: No proposed order. [LRSF 14.7 A.] The petition was not signed and verified by the administrator. [Probate Code Section 1023 and CRC 7.103(c).] The accounting exceeds the number of years permitted by this Court. [LRSF 14.35 A.] (The accounting period in the first paragraph of this petition also does not jibe with the accounting period shown in the petition caption.) The beginning assets do not agree with the ending assets shown in the second accounting. Original financial account statement(s) must be filed to verify the ending balance of cash. [LRSF 14.35 D.] Proof of the additional bond ordered on 5/6/21 has not yet been filed. The Final I&A amount shown in paragraph 28 of the petition is not supported by the three I&As filed in this proceeding. The fee calculation also appears to be incorrect. No "Declaration of Attorney re Extraordinary Fees (1/1/2017 - 12/31/2020)" appears to have been filed yet. Fees and costs previously ordered should not be part of this petition and will not be ordered again. If they have not yet been paid, they should be reflected on a liabilities schedule in the accounting. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 7/9/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WALTER ROBERT FRANKLIN SCHUCHARDT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/7/2021. 1) Please file a copy of Decedent's death certificate. 2) Please explain how the wrong date of death was used when this probate was opened and please provide the date of when the actual date of death was discovered. 3) Please explain page 2 line 25 as the petition alleges the account covers October 15, 2015 when it appears petitioner now alleges Decedent died October 17, 2015. 4) Please file receipts for all Chase Autopay entries on page 57 under Schedule C. Disbursements. 5) Please explain on Schedule C. Disbursements entry 12/10/2015 U.S. Treasury - Reclaimed Social Security Payments. 6) The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. [LRSF 14.35 D.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/28/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DAVID M. LERMA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. (A petition is either corrected by an amendment or a fully amended pleading or additional information is provided in a supplement a petition. [CRC 7.3.] An amending pleading can also provide additional information, but a supplement (or "supplemental declaration") cannot correct information in a petition. The requirement for notice is dictated by the nature of the pleading (supplement vs. amendment/amended petition). [CRC 7.53.])

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MAUREEN E. CROWE TRUST DATED JULY 16, 2016
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition: For Removal, Appointment, Or Confirmation Of Trustee; For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Damages; To Compel Trust Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/19/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: An amended petition was filed on 5/14/21, which was not at least 30 days before this hearing. No proof of service of notice of the amended petition appears to have been filed yet. [CRC 7.53(a).] If this is an 850 petition, Notice of Hearing (Judicial Council form DE-115) with a copy of the petition must be served on all trust beneficiaries. An amended pleading restates and supersedes the pleading it amends for all purposes. [CRC 7.3(3).] Incorporation by reference of documents submitted as exhibits attached to a prior pleading is inadequate. As noted previously, the petition does not indicate how this is the proper venue. The properties referenced in paragraph 3 of the prayer must be clearly identified to the extent known, not merely referenced as those listed in the exhibits attached to the petition. An "Update" is not a proper pleading and will be disregarded. Pleadings are either petitions, supplements or amendments, objections, responses, etc. [CRC 7.3(2).] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 7/9/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KWAN MEE EI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/28/2021 1) The petition for final distribution must state the date on which notice to the Franchise Tax Board was mailed pursuant to Probate Code 9202(c). [LRSF 14.36 I. 2)] 2) Please provide the legal basis for using $253,197.46 to calculate statutory fees. Notwithstanding the waiver of account, if the petition and report requests statutory commissions or fees based on any amount other than the amount of the Inventory and Appraisal, detailed schedules of receipts and gains and losses on sales must be included. [CRC 7.705 b)] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/14/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Transfer Trust To Another Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/2021. 1) In the Supplement no ages were listed as required under Probate Code 17402. 2) The 04/22/2021 Supplement was not responsive to the Examiner Note. Please file legal authority in support of the petition. Also see Probate Code 17209. 3) The Court will require a bond of all successor trustees not named in the trust instrument unless all beneficiaries waive bond. The assets on hand must be listed with the fair market value to allow the Court to set the bond. [LRSF 14.16 G.] An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 6/28/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARK JOSEPH GOLDSTEIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: There is no Attachment 7 to the petition, setting forth the facts upon which the petitioner bases the allegation that property described in Attachments 7a and 7b is property that should pass or be confirmed to the surviving spouse. Please file the vesting deeds for each property to show how title is held. The will is not self-proving. Proof of Subscribing Witness must be filed. Item 10 of the petition is incomplete, as Adam Orosco is also named as an alternate executor. Courtesy copies of papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/30/21. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARTE TORRE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/19/21 . (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: The copy of the will attached to the amended petition is not a true copy of the will that was lodged, which had actual signatures. Item 5a(7) or (8) of the petition must be answered. These issues must be addressed in a supplement to the amended petition, signed and verified by the petitioner. (Where a marriage is dissolved after a will is executed, unless the will expressly provides otherwise, a former spouse has no standing or interest. [Probate Code Section 6122.]) A courtesy copy of the supplement must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 7/9/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SONIA GUTIERREZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: Notice mailed on 4/19/21 was not at least 15 days before the 5/3/21 hearing. Notice of Petition to Administer Estate must be mailed at least 15 days BEFORE 7/12/21. The corrected/complete Duties and Liabilities was not filed concurrently with the supplement. (The supplement also misstated items 3g(2)(b) and 3g(2)(c) in paragraphs 3 and 4, respectively.) Courtesy copies of any paper filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/30/21. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.7 B. and C.] Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 9th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Court to determine amount of bond for nonresident. Petition alleges $350,000.00 est in personal property and no income. Petitioner requests $20,000.00 bond. Petitioner alleges creditor claim time period has expired but does not address Probate Code 9100.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GAIL ANN CLABBY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/12/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.18 C.] Who were the decedent's parents and when did they die? None of the Waivers of Bond identifies the proposed personal representative in item 4. Courtesy copies of papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 6/30/21. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C.] Courtesy copies are endorsed filed hard copies. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
